title: Eventual Safe States
hints: A node is safe if it cannot reach any cycle. Consider marking nodes based on whether they are part of or lead to a cycle.
Use three colors: 0 for unvisited, 1 for visiting, and 2 for safe. If you encounter a node with color 1 during traversal, a cycle exists.
Perform DFS from each node. If a path leads to a node marked 1, mark current as unsafe. If all neighbors are 2, mark current as 2.
